title: 10 best herbal tinctures for earache
description: Wintergreen tinctures helps with earache because of its natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The menthol content in wintergreen tincture has been shown to numb the pain and reduce swelling, providing quick relief from earache discomfort. Additionally, wintergreen's mucilaginous properties help to soothe and calm irritated tissues, reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy environment within the ear canal.
